findings.evidence: The generic template contains stub launch, resume, merge, dry-run, and one-field schemas; detailed operating docs and task-package creation or role-policy validation are missing while the two-test gate passes.
findings.required_fix: Synchronize the complete validated generic implementation with configurable model handling and full offline coverage, without project-specific content.
findings.acceptance_test: Template gate covers mocked initial/resume same-session lifecycle, role result routing, contracts, assignments, recursive sanitization, dynamic classification, and preview no-call without ORCH-001.

findings.evidence: All role launch commands use worker_result.schema.json and run_plan always validates WORKER_RESULT, although Scientific and Artifact Reviewers must output FINDINGS only.
findings.required_fix: Route output schema and validation by role: Scientific, Artifact, and applicable Explorer sessions use FINDINGS; Owner and Final Verifier use WORKER_RESULT.
findings.acceptance_test: Mock JSONL proves correct schema and validator for each role, and rejects a wrong result kind.

findings.evidence: resume_owner has only --execute while build_resume_command unconditionally selects workspace-write.
findings.required_fix: Require an independent --allow-workspace-write opt-in for executable resume, while preserving a no-call preview.
findings.acceptance_test: Execute without allow is rejected; execute plus allow builds supported resume; preview makes no call and leaks no private marker.

findings.evidence: classify-existing converts any EXEC_FAILURE to MODEL_UNAVAILABLE and PARTIAL even without an explicit model or provider availability signal.
findings.required_fix: Remove blanket override; use the same explicit availability classifier as live mode.
findings.acceptance_test: Existing generic or argument failure is FAIL, while existing unknown-model or provider 5xx is PARTIAL.
